ogTitle: Sellicks Hill vs Semaphore: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Sellicks Hill and Semaphore.
heading: Sellicks Hill vs Semaphore — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Sellicks Hill, South Australia and Semaphore, South Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Sellicks Hill has a lower overall climate risk score (34/100) compared to Semaphore (39/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Sellicks Hill or Semaphore safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Sellicks Hill has a flood risk score of 27/100, while Semaphore scores 47/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Sellicks Hill scores 54/100 for bushfire risk. Semaphore scores 43/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Sellicks Hill or Semaphore?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Sellicks Hill has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.35% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
